title: Rating community resilience with a deep learning framework
description: An understanding of community resilience and risk analysis is vital when it comes to protecting civilians and infrastructure from natural hazards, such as hurricanes or earthquakes. Artificial intelligence is an efficient way to rate a community's resilience and vulnerability. However, factors that affect community resilience—like power grids and communications systems—are ranked independently by current assessment methods based on the assumed impact of each factor.

title: Oracle cuts over 600 Bay Area jobs in new waves of layoffs
description: Oracle has disclosed plans to slash well over 600 jobs in the Bay Area in a wrenching round of staffing reductions that arrive as the company attempts to navigate the artificial intelligence upheaval.
content:
Oracle disclosed plans to slash 654 jobs in the Bay Area after recent reports that the company had emailed termination notices to potentially thousands of employees worldwide.

title: Larry Berman: Why are U.S. earnings going higher?
description: Why are U.S. earnings going higher? Simply, the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on profit margins is significant. It’s expected to drive tech sector earnings in a material way. It is also impacting job growth in the sector and improving productivity.

title: AI emerges throughout Southern California’s real estate industry
description: Artificial intelligence has finally landed in the real estate industry to help with handwriting hundreds of prospecting cards to a digital consultant that can narrow down mortgage options.
content:

title: AI reveals hidden connections within legal systems
description: As governments worldwide explore how artificial intelligence can transform decision-making, a recent study from Sultan Qaboos University demonstrates how AI can uncover hidden connections within legal systems—offering a powerful tool to support smarter lawmaking. Published in The Journal of Engineering Research, the study applies natural language processing (NLP) and network analysis to Oman's Labor Law of 2023, revealing a complex web of interdependencies between its articles that may not be apparent through conventional legal review.
